name: Sapiens Insurance Platform API
what_it_does: Sapiens International Corporation REST API for insurance core systems including policy administration, claims management, billing, and reinsurance. Enables AI agents to manage policy lifecycle and endorsement processing for P&C and L&A insurance automation, handle claims intake and adjudication workflow for claims processing automation, access underwriting rules engine integration for automated risk assessment, retrieve billing and premium collection management for insurance finance automation, manage reinsurance treaty and facultative placement for ceded risk automation, handle regulatory reporting and state filing for insurance compliance, access digital insurance and omni-channel distribution for insurtech integration, retrieve actuarial data and loss reserve management for financial reporting, manage agency and broker management for distribution automation, and integrate Sapiens with ERP, CRM, and regulatory reporting platforms.
use_cases: Processing policy endorsements from underwriting agents
Automating claims adjudication from claims processing agents
Managing reinsurance placements from ceded risk agents
Generating regulatory filings from compliance agents
not_for: Non-insurance industries without policy or claims workflows
Small insurers without core system modernization needs
Insurtech startups without legacy system integration requirements
best_when: An insurance carrier, reinsurer, or managing general agent using Sapiens ALIS, IDIT, or IDITSuite wants AI agents to automate policy administration, claims processing, billing, and regulatory compliance workflows.
avoid_when: INSURANCE REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Automated policy issuance and endorsement must comply with state-filed rates and forms; automated rate or form changes without state approval creates insurance regulatory violation. Claims adjudication automation — automated claims payment decisions without adjuster review creates bad faith liability; reserve adequacy and coverage determination require human oversight for complex or disputed claims. Reinsurance treaty compliance — automated reinsurance bordereau reporting requires accurate cession calculations; errors in automated reinsurance accounting create treaty breach and financial reporting inaccuracies. Personal lines AI underwriting — automated AI-driven underwriting decisions must comply with NAIC model laws on algorithmic underwriting; potential disparate impact on protected classes requires fair lending and ECOA compliance review.

auth.notes: Sapiens uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Holon, Israel HQ. NASDAQ: SPNS. Founded 1992. Public company (Francisco Partners major shareholder). 600+ insurance customers in 30+ countries. ALIS (life & annuities), IDIT (P&C), and reinsurance platforms. Competes with Guidewire, Duck Creek, and Majesco for insurance core systems.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise license; per-module and per-policy pricing
pricing.notes: Holon, Israel. NASDAQ: SPNS. Founded 1992. Francisco Partners major shareholder. 600+ insurance customers. ALIS, IDIT, reinsurance platforms. Competes with Guidewire and Duck Creek.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: STATE RATE AND FORM COMPLIANCE: Automated policy issuance must use only state-approved rates and forms; automated rating or form changes without DOI approval create insurance regulatory violations and potential market conduct examination findings

Claims bad faith risk — automated claims payment without adjuster review creates bad faith liability for wrongful denial or underpayment; complex or disputed claims require human adjuster oversight with AI as decision support only

Reinsurance accounting accuracy — automated bordereau and cession calculations require precise treaty terms implementation; reinsurance accounting errors create financial statement misstatements and treaty breach risk
No webhooks — policy event and claims status notification requires polling; no native push for policy issuance confirmation or claims payment events

NAIC algorithmic underwriting compliance — AI-driven underwriting decisions must comply with state insurance department guidance on algorithmic underwriting models; disparate impact testing required for personal lines automation

Multi-platform complexity — Sapiens offers ALIS (life/annuity), IDIT (P&C), and reinsurance platforms; API endpoints and data models differ significantly between platforms; verify product-specific API documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance core systems. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/IL. Policy, claims, and reinsurance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance core systems. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/IL. Policy and claims data.
